dg_granule_cell.label: dentate gyrus granule cell
dg_granule_cell.note: Exact label match. Synonym 'dentate gyrus of hippocampal formation granule cell'. Definition: principal cell type of the dentate gyrus with elliptical soma and cone-shaped spiny apical dendrites. In human_subset and mouse_subset.

dg_mossy_cell.note: No CL term found for hilar mossy cell. Children of CL:4023062 (dentate gyrus neuron) include dentate gyrus granule cell (CL:2000089), basket cell (CL:2000087), kisspeptin neuron (CL:4023124), and stellate cell (CL:2000090); none matches mossy cell. Potential CL contribution — the excitatory hilar mossy cell is a well-characterised glutamatergic principal cell type of the dentate hilus absent from the current CL.

ca3_pyramidal_cell.label: hippocampal pyramidal neuron
ca3_pyramidal_cell.note: CA3-specific term absent from CL. Best available match is CL:1001571 (hippocampal pyramidal neuron), which carries the synonym 'hippocampus (CA) pyramidal cell' covering CA1–CA3 without subfield specificity. CL:4023060 (hippocampal CA1-3 neuron) is another BROAD option but lacks the pyramidal identity. BROAD mapping used because the CL term spans the entire CA field.

ca1_pyramidal_cell.label: hippocampal pyramidal neuron
ca1_pyramidal_cell.note: CA1-specific term absent from CL. Same BROAD mapping to CL:1001571 as CA3; the synonym 'hippocampus (CA) pyramidal cell' covers the CA subfields collectively but does not discriminate CA1 from CA3. BROAD mapping used for the same reason.

ms_dbb_glutamatergic_neuron.note: No CL term found for medial septal / diagonal band of Broca glutamatergic neuron. CL has cholinergic (CL:0000108) and GABAergic neurons but no region-specific septal glutamatergic type. CL:0000679 (glutamatergic neuron) is too broad. Potential CL contribution — VGluT1/VGluT2+ MS-DBB neurons projecting to hippocampal interneurons are functionally distinct and well-characterised.

hpc_cajal_retzius_cell.label: Cajal-Retzius cell
hpc_cajal_retzius_cell.note: Exact label match at the generic level (CL:0000695 = Cajal-Retzius cell). Mapping type is BROAD because CL:0000695 describes the general CR cell class across cortex and hippocampus, while the proposed type is the specifically hippocampal, adult-persisting, glutamatergic subpopulation (reelin+/calretinin+/VGluT3+). The CL definition explicitly notes the hippocampal stratum lacunosum-moleculare and OML localisation. Rich definition_references harvested.

ca1_radiatum_giant_cell.note: No CL term found for CA1 radiatum giant cell. Searches for 'radiatum giant cell', 'giant cell hippocampus', and 'CA1 radiatum' returned no hippocampus-specific CL neuronal terms. This is a rare specialised excitatory projection neuron in CA1 stratum radiatum first described by Kirson et al. (2000); potential CL contribution.
